title: Bydgoszcz, Kuyavian-Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Bydgoszcz is a city in Kuyavian-Pomeranian with a population of 348,190. A charming city on the Brda River, known for its picturesque waterfront, Art Nouveau architecture, and a growing IT and business services sector.
